_comment: PurpleMirror fleet config. COPY this to ~/Library/Application Support/PurpleMirror/fleet.json on EACH Mac (it is NOT read from the repo, and must NOT be committed — this repo is public and the real file carries LAN IPs/usernames). Each node identifies ITSELF by matching `computerName` to its `scutil --get ComputerName`, and treats the other machines as remote hosts — so the same file on every node meshes them all. Each machine also needs Remote Login on + the others' SSH keys in its ~/.ssh/authorized_keys.
